category_sources: Official GitHub README describes md5deep/hashdeep as tools to compute hashes/message digests and audit known hashes.
source_facts.description says md5deep recursively computes digests on files and directories.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README describes this toolset as md5deep and notes md5deep vs hashdeep naming.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says complete documentation is on the project homepage and includes usage examples.
Official repository includes a man directory for command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/jessek/hashdeep; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it computes MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, Tiger, and Whirlpool hashes and can audit files against known hashes.
source_facts.executables lists hashdeep, md5deep, sha1deep, sha256deep, tigerdeep, and whirlpooldeep.
